GG0170A4_ROLL_FLWP_CD GG0170A4 Mobility: Roll Left Right Ability at Follow-Up Indicates the patient's ability to roll left and right at follow-up. 06. Independent – Patient completes the activity by him/herself with no assistance from a helper.
05. Setup or clean-up assistance – Helper sets up or cleans up; patient completes activity. Helper assists only prior to or following the activity.
04. Supervision or touching
